message:
Fix width type casting in compact() tests

Add explicit `as u8` cast when passing width() to GraphemeId::new():
- width() returns a larger type (likely u32 or usize)
- GraphemeId::new() expects u8 for the width parameter
- Fixes type mismatch compiler warnings/errors in tests

Affected tests:
- test_compact_with_shared_refs: remapped1, remapped3 construction
- test_compact_large_pool: remapped construction in verification loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
